meaning: n.侦察,搜索,侦察员,侦察机vi.守候,侦察,巡视,嘲笑vt.侦察,跟踪,觅得,监视,轻蔑地拒绝(建议,意见等)
examples: He wore the garb of a scout.
We went ahead to scout out the lie of the land.
Joshua sends out spies to scout out the land.
Once his concept is approved, the Scout can begin to build a prototype of his game.
Testing of a Scout's game can be done at Scouting functions such as camp outings.
